hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/\b(uvicorn|gunicorn|fastapi)\b/.test(cmd)&&!/tmux/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: Run dev servers inside tmux so logs are accessible.');console.error('[Hook] Use: tmux new -d -s dev \"uvicorn main:app --reload\"');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block dev server commands outside tmux

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/\bgit\s+push\b/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] Reminder: Review changes before pushing.');console.error('[Hook] Consider: git log --oneline -5 && git diff HEAD~1')}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Remind to review changes before git push

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/\bgit\s+commit\b/.test(cmd)){const msgMatch=cmd.match(/-m\s+[\"']([^\"']*)[\"']/);if(msgMatch){const msg=msgMatch[1];if(!/^(feat|fix|docs|test|refactor|chore|perf|ci|build|style)(\(.+\))?:/.test(msg)){console.error('[Hook] Commit message should use conventional format: feat|fix|docs|test|refactor|chore: description');console.error('[Hook] Example: feat(policy): add SSAC threshold rule')}}if(/\bconsole\.log\b|\bprint\(/.test(cmd)){console.error('[Hook] WARNING: Possible debug statements in commit')}}console.log(d)})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const c=i.tool_input?.content||'';const lines=c.split('\n').length;if(lines>800){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: File exceeds 800 lines ('+lines+' lines)');console.error('[Hook] Split into smaller, focused modules');process.exit(2)}if(/\.(py|js|jsx)$/.test(p)&&/(api[_-]?key|password|secret|token)\s*=\s*[\"'][^\"']{8,}/.test(c)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: Possible hardcoded credential detected');process.exit(2)}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Block large files (>800 lines) and hardcoded credentials

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/i.test(p)&&!/README|CLAUDE|CONTRIBUTING|CHANGELOG|LICENSE|SKILL|docs[\\/]|skills[\\/]|memory[\\/]|agents[\\/]/i.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] Warning: Creating non-standard doc file: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Standard locations: README.md, CLAUDE.md, docs/, memory/')}console.log(d)})"

node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';if(/gh\s+pr\s+create/.test(cmd)&&out){const m=out.match(/https:\/\/github\.com\/[^\s]+/);if(m){console.error('[Hook] PR created: '+m[0]);console.error('[Hook] Review: gh pr view '+m[0]+' --web')}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Log PR URL after gh pr create

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';const out=i.tool_output?.output||'';if(/pytest/.test(cmd)&&out){const failMatch=out.match(/(\d+) failed/);const passMatch=out.match(/(\d+) passed/);if(failMatch){console.error('[Hook] TEST FAILURES: '+failMatch[1]+' failed'+(passMatch?' / '+passMatch[1]+' passed':''));console.error('[Hook] Fix failures before committing')}else if(passMatch){console.error('[Hook] Tests: '+passMatch[1]+' passed')}}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Summarize pytest results after test runs

hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';const ns=i.tool_input?.new_string||'';if(/\.py$/.test(p)){if(/\bprint\(/.test(ns)&&!/logging/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] Warning: print() statement added to '+p);console.error('[Hook] Consider using logging module instead')}if(/\beval\(/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] Warning: eval() usage in '+p);console.error('[Hook] Ensure safe defaults are injected before eval (Q-code pattern)')}}if(/TODO|FIXME|HACK/.test(ns)){console.error('[Hook] New TODO/FIXME added — consider creating an issue')}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Warn about print(), eval(), and TODO statements in edits
